summary_text: **Findings (Release Readiness)** - **High**: `fugue-orchestration-gate.yml` is a mixed diff with broad runtime-substrate expansion beyond MBP `/kernel` `/vote` setup. It adds many trigger paths and test invocations unrelated to launcher/prompt install scope, increasing blast radius. [.github/workflows/fugue-orchestration-gate.yml:24](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.github/workflows/fugue-orchestration-gate.yml:24) [.github/workflows/fugue-orchestration-gate.yml:62](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.github/workflows/fugue-orchestration-gate.yml:62) [.github/workflows/fugue-orchestration-gate.yml:283](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.github/workflows/fugue-orchestration-gate.yml:283) - **High**: Workflow now executes files that are currently untracked in this worktree. If committed naively (especially `-a`/tracked-only), CI will reference missing files and fail. [.github/workflows/fugue-orchestration-gate.yml:230](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.github/workflows/fugue-orchestration-gate.yml:230) [.github/workflows/fugue-orchestration-gate.yml:233](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.github/workflows/fugue-orchestration-gate.yml:233) Referenced files include untracked entries like `tests/test-kernel-entrypoint.sh`, `tests/test-kernel-launcher-template.sh`, `tests/test-codex-orchestrator-snippet.sh`. - **Medium**: `README.md` is also mixed. It contains a large 4-pane operational section not required for the MBP launcher/prompt fix, plus the targeted MBP install notes. This should not ship as one atomic change unless intentionally bundling product behavior docs. [README.md:50](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/README.md:50) [README.md:566](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/README.md:566) - **Medium**: The installer/test work itself is coherent and validated locally, but it now depends on additional launcher assets (`kernel-entrypoint.sh`, `launchers/k4`) that are untracked in the current tree. Release packaging is incomplete unless those are intentionally included. [scripts/local/install-kernel-launchers.sh:10](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/install-kernel-launchers.sh:10) [scripts/local/install-kernel-launchers.sh:11](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/install-kernel-launchers.sh:11) - **Low**: Contract hardening additions are good and consistent (MBP copilot fallback + non-interactive `k open/new` clarification), and checks pass; this part looks release-ready once diff isolation is fixed. [scripts/check-codex-kernel-prompt.sh:93](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/check-codex-kernel-prompt.sh:93) [scripts/check-codex-kernel-prompt.sh:198](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/check-codex-kernel-prompt.sh:198) [CODEX.md:97](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/CODEX.md:97) **Recommendation** - **Do not commit now.** - **Safest execution is to further isolate changes**, then commit only a minimal MBP setup slice (installer + its tests + prompt contract check updates + narrowly scoped README lines), or intentionally ship a larger runtime/4-pane batch after separate validation. - Current state is technically functional locally, but release packaging risk is high due to mixed diffs and untracked-file dependency in workflow paths.
